case_title: LYNN, CARLY et al VS FORD, LESTER DBA LP FORD'S CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,850.00 FILED BY LYNN, CARLY LIM, JACKIE AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, LESTER DBA LP FORD'S CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
